title: Lectionary
description: Rough guide for personal reading following the church calendar
note: Not intended for liturgical use. Consult parish for actual readings.

entries.feast: Fourth Sunday Before Lent: Sunday of the Publican and Pharisee
Third Sunday Before Lent: Sunday of the Prodigal Son
Second Sunday Before Lent: Sunday of the Last Judgment (Meatfare Sunday)
Sunday Before Lent: Forgiveness Sunday (Cheesefare Sunday)
First Sunday of Great Lent: Sunday of Orthodoxy
Second Sunday of Great Lent: Commemoration of St. Gregory Palamas
Third Sunday of Great Lent: Adoration of the Holy Cross
Fourth Sunday of Great Lent: Commemoration of Saint John of the Ladder
Fifth Sunday of Great Lent: Commemoration of Saint Mary of Egypt
The Entry of the Lord into Jerusalem: Palm Sunday
Second Sunday of Pascha: Thomas Sunday
Fourth Sunday of Pascha: Sunday of the Paralytic
Fifth Sunday of Pascha: Sunday of the Samaritan Woman
Sixth Sunday of Pascha: Sunday of the Blind Man
Thursday: The Ascension of Our Lord
Seventh Sunday of Pascha: Sunday of the Fathers of the First Ecumenical Council

entries.day: Monday: Day of the Holy Spirit
entries.feast: Monday: Day of the Holy Spirit
First Sunday after Pentecost: Sunday of All Saints

entries.day: The Meeting of Our Lord Jesus Christ (February 2/15)
entries.feast: The Meeting of Our Lord Jesus Christ (February 2/15)

entries.day: The Transfiguration of Our Lord Jesus Christ (August 6/19)
entries.feast: The Transfiguration of Our Lord Jesus Christ (August 6/19)

entries.day: The Exaltation of the Precious and Life–Giving Cross (September 14/27)
entries.feast: The Exaltation of the Precious and Life–Giving Cross (September 14/27)

entries.day: The Entry of the Theotokos into the Temple (November 21/December 4)
entries.feast: The Entry of the Theotokos into the Temple (November 21/December 4)
Sunday of the Holy Ancestors of Christ (Two Sundays before Nativity)
Sunday before Nativity: Sunday of the Holy Fathers
Eve of the Nativity of Christ (December 24/January 6)
The Nativity of Our Lord Jesus Christ (December 25/ January 7)
The Theophany of Our Lord Jesus Christ (January 6/19)

entries.day: The First and Second Finding of the Head of St. John the Baptist (February 24/March 9)
entries.feast: The First and Second Finding of the Head of St. John the Baptist (February 24/March 9)

entries.day: The Third Finding of the Head of St. John the Baptist (May 29/June 7)
entries.feast: The Third Finding of the Head of St. John the Baptist (May 29/June 7)

entries.day: The Nativity of St. John the Baptist (June 4/July 7)
entries.feast: The Nativity of St. John the Baptist (June 4/July 7)

entries.day: The Holy Leaders of the Apostles, Peter and Paul (June 29/July 12)
entries.feast: The Holy Leaders of the Apostles, Peter and Paul (June 29/July 12)

entries.day: The Beheading of St. John the Baptist (August 29/ September 11)
entries.feast: The Beheading of St. John the Baptist (August 29/ September 11)

entries.day: The Conception of St. John the Baptist (September 23/October 6)
entries.feast: The Conception of St. John the Baptist (September 23/October 6)

entries.day: Synaxis of the Archangel Michael and All the Bodiless Powers (November 8/21)
entries.feast: Synaxis of the Archangel Michael and All the Bodiless Powers (November 8/21)
